description: CRITICAL jurisdictional finding (fire-marshal acceptance test) that rides the deep-reasoning path; verifier corrected a missing witnessed-test requirement with a grounded state fire-marshal citation.

finding.issue: Spec omits the fire marshal witnessed acceptance test the authority having jurisdiction requires before occupancy; the closeout section only references contractor self-certification.
finding.replacementText: System acceptance shall be witnessed and approved by the authority having jurisdiction (fire marshal) prior to occupancy, in addition to contractor certification.
finding.codeReference: IFC / local fire marshal acceptance-test policy

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Contractor shall self-certify system acceptance.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: The IFC and typical fire-marshal policy require a witnessed acceptance test of the fire-suppression system by the AHJ before occupancy for a mission-critical facility. Contractor self-certification alone does not satisfy the jurisdiction's acceptance-test requirement.
captured_verifier_response.correction: System acceptance shall be witnessed and approved by the authority having jurisdiction (fire marshal) prior to occupancy.

ground_truth.correct_correction_text: System acceptance shall be witnessed and approved by the authority having jurisdiction (fire marshal) prior to occupancy.
ground_truth.notes: Exercises the CRITICAL + jurisdictional routing that must ride deep reasoning (Opus). AHJ witnessed acceptance is a real requirement for occupancy.
